panels.description: A wide shot of a high-tech laboratory set inside a sewer tunnel where a reptilian scientist works at a computer bank while a man stands inside a glowing blue stasis chamber.
The reptilian scientist looms over the shirtless man, warning him about the dangers of following Reed Richards' methods.
A close-up of the man's face as he expresses his desire to ensure the experiment works.
A close-up profile of the reptilian scientist's face as he promises the procedure will work.
A narrow vertical shot of equipment in the background.
A small text box or detail bar at the bottom of the page.
A close-up of the reptilian scientist's hand holding a device with a red button labeled 'DEET'.

text_blocks.text: ...I CAN HELP YOU SHARE THISSSS GIFT.
text_blocks.speaker: Reptilian Scientist

text_blocks.text: YOU SURE ABOUT THIS, DOC? YOU'VE TESTED IT...?
text_blocks.speaker: Man

text_blocks.text: REED ALWAYS SAID ANY GOOD EXPERIMENT MUST BE TESTED AT LEAST--
text_blocks.speaker: Reptilian Scientist

text_blocks.text: LISSSSTENING TO REED RICHARDSSSS HASSSSS ONLY CAUSED PROBLEMS. LISSSSTENING TO REED RICHARDSSSS TURNED YOU INTO A MONSSSSTER.
text_blocks.speaker: Reptilian Scientist

text_blocks.text: I JUST WANNA MAKE SURE THIS WORKS, OKAY?
text_blocks.speaker: Man

page_summary: In a makeshift laboratory located in a sewer, a reptilian scientist prepares to perform an experiment on a man. Despite warnings about the dangers of following Reed Richards' methods, the man insists on proceeding, and the scientist prepares to activate a device.
